description: Cloud Domains is a Google Cloud service for registering and managing internet domain names within Google Cloud projects. It lets users configure and manage domain registrations and related settings programmatically or through Google Cloud tools.
summary: domains.googleapis.com exposes the Google Cloud Domains HTTP API plus the `gcloud domains` CLI surface; docs indicate OAuth 2.0 access tokens are supported, and the v1beta1 discovery document also exposes API-key query auth.
